levels.hook: Something old and stone lurks behind the treeline.
levels.description: Moss-covered masonry rises from the canopy in the distance, half-swallowed by the forest.

levels.hook: You push deeper into the undergrowth.
levels.description: Stone steps lead down into a vaulted chamber, roots splitting the walls. Carvings cover every surface—a script you cannot read.

levels.hook: At the heart of the ruin, something stirs.
levels.description: A dryad sits atop a cracked altar, watching you with eyes like polished jade. She does not speak first.

levels.hook: A thin ribbon of smoke rises through the canopy.
levels.description: From the tree line you can make out a crude shelter built into a hollow oak, a small fire smoldering outside.

levels.hook: You follow the smell of pine resin and old leather.
levels.description: A hermit's camp—worn maps pinned to bark, bones of small animals strung in patterns. Someone lives here, but not comfortably.

levels.hook: The hollow's occupant returns.
levels.description: An old ranger steps from the shadows, bow undrawn. He studies your face before he speaks: 'You're not the first to find this place. The last one didn't leave.'

levels.hook: A crude watchtower pokes above the canopy ahead.
levels.description: Lashed-together timbers and a smoking fire pit mark the edge of a goblin encampment in the trees.

levels.hook: You circle the perimeter.
levels.description: A disorganized camp sprawls through the undergrowth—stolen goods in sacks, crude traps half-set, goblin squabbles heard from every direction.

levels.hook: You've been spotted.
levels.description: A war-horn sounds. The camp erupts.

levels.hook: A dark opening is cut into the cliff face ahead.
levels.description: The mouth of an old mine yawns from the mountainside, timbers rotting at the entrance, a rusted cart tipped on its side nearby.

levels.hook: You venture into the shaft.
levels.description: The tunnel opens into a worked cavern. Ore veins glint in your torch-light—and so do eyes in the dark.

levels.hook: Something has made this mine its den.
levels.description: A nest of bones and stolen equipment fills the deepest chamber. Whatever built it is still here.

levels.hook: A crooked spire of dark stone crowns the peak ahead.
levels.description: The tower is old—older than the keep it once belonged to, if the rubble around its base is any clue.

levels.hook: You find the door ajar.
levels.description: The interior reeks of sulfur and burnt parchment. Experiments in mid-progress clutter every surface. Someone was here very recently.

levels.hook: The tower's occupant descends.
levels.description: A peak warlock sweeps down from the upper floor, clearly unhappy about the intrusion.

levels.hook: The narrow pass ahead is eerily quiet.
levels.description: A well-used road squeezes between two sheer rock faces. There are no travelers in either direction.

levels.hook: You notice the rope strung across the path.
levels.description: A crude toll barrier marks the middle of the pass. Coin pouches hang from a stake—taxes already collected from those who came before.

levels.hook: The collectors step out.
levels.description: Three figures drop from the rocks above, blades drawn, grinning.

levels.hook: A mill turns slowly on a river that's run dry.
levels.description: Visible from the road—a watermill still grinding, though the channel feeding it has been empty for years.

levels.hook: You approach the mill.
levels.description: The wheel turns without water, without wind—without any apparent reason. Inside, the grinding stones move as if freshly loaded.

levels.hook: Something feeds on the mill's purpose.
levels.description: A slime creature has burrowed into the mill's workings, feeding off its motion. It pulses with an oily glow.

levels.hook: A farmstead sits dark and still in the fields ahead.
levels.description: Smoke rises from a chimney but no lantern burns in the window. The livestock are gone.

levels.hook: You cross the threshold.
levels.description: The inside has been turned into a staging camp. Stolen goods in sacks, crude maps pinned to the walls, a half-eaten meal still warm.

levels.hook: The raiders return from the fields.
levels.description: Boots crunch on the threshold. They see you immediately.

levels.hook: A derelict ship drifts against the current.
levels.description: A merchantman, sails in tatters, lists on the open water with no visible crew on deck.

levels.hook: You board the vessel.
levels.description: The hold is open to the sky, the cargo untouched. Whatever happened here, it wasn't a raid.

levels.hook: The wreck isn't empty.
levels.description: Something has been living in the captain's quarters. It stirs as you open the door.

levels.hook: Stone columns rise from the water near a shallow reef.
levels.description: The tops of ancient pillars break the surface—whatever they once supported now lies beneath the waves.

levels.hook: You dive below the surface.
levels.description: A temple complex stretches across the sea floor, encrusted with coral. Offerings still rest on the altars, undisturbed for centuries.

levels.hook: The shrine has a guardian.
levels.description: A reef marauder circles the innermost chamber, trailing kelp like a cloak. It turns to face you.
